title: Serve HTML profile page for browser visitors (content negotiation)
description: GET /users/{username} currently always returns application/activity+json. When Accept header prefers text/html (browser visit, 'view on original site' link in Mastodon), serve a simple HTML profile page showing display name, bio, recent posts, and metadata fields. Use content negotiation: Accept: application/activity+json → JSON-LD, Accept: text/html → HTML page.
close_reason: HTML profile page served via content negotiation. Browser gets styled HTML with display name, bio, metadata fields, recent posts. AP clients get JSON-LD. Same URL.
